raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Feather Alert system helps law enforcement quickly notify the public about missing Native Americans.",
    "Between 1999 and 2019, homicide was the third-leading cause of death among American Indian and Alaska Native women and girls.",
    "The homicide rate for Native American women on reservations is 10 times the national average.",
    "The implementation of the Feather Alert system aims to improve response times when Indigenous individuals go missing or are endangered.",
    "California has the greatest population of Native Americans in the nation and is among the states with the highest rates of reported cases of Missing and Murdered Indigenous People.",
    "A report by the Sovereign Bodies Institute indicates that only nine percent of murders of indigenous women in California have ever been solved.",
    "Tribal leaders have urged legislators to take more urgent action to address unsolved cases and provide immediate support for suspected abductions and violence against California Indian people.",
    "More immediate notification to the public can potentially assist in locating missing victims."
  ]
}
```
